title: FastChest Update
description:
Unofficial port of FastChest to Minecraft 26.1-26.2 Replaces 3D chest renderers with static block models for improved FPS. Original mod by Domi.

Este mod hace que los cofres utilicen modelos de bloques estáticos para un mejor rendimiento.
body:
## FastChest — Unofficial Port for Minecraft 26.1-26.2

This is an unofficial port of the [FastChest mod](https://github.com/FakeDomi/FastChest) 
by Domi to Minecraft Java Edition **26.1 (Tiny Takeover)**.

### What does it do?
FastChest replaces the animated 3D renderer of normal chests and ender chests 
with a simple static block model. This eliminates unnecessary animations and 
significantly improves FPS in areas with many chests.

### Requirements
- Minecraft 26.1
- Fabric Loader 0.17.2+
- Fabric API 0.146.1+26.1.2

### Notes
- This is an unofficial port. Original mod created by [Domi](https://github.com/FakeDomi/FastChest).
- Licensed under MIT.
- Source code: https://github.com/FakeDomi/FastChest

---

*Si hablas español: Este mod reemplaza el renderizador 3D de los cofres por modelos 
estáticos, mejorando el rendimiento (FPS) en zonas con muchos cofres.*
Port no oficial de FastChest a Minecraft 26.1.
Mod original creado por Domi: https://github.com/FakeDomi/FastChest
